expert_rss.summary: The 7th Infantry Division (Multi-Domain Command-Pacific) is the Army's newest theater-enabling command, built to integrate maneuver, fires, air defense, cyber, space, electronic warfare, intelligence, unmanned systems, sustainment and command and control to support the joint force across the Pacific.

expert_rss.summary:

A teenage girl died, while more than a dozen people were injured after a fast-moving vehicle crashed into a Muharram majlis at Masjid-o-Imambargah Baqiatullah on Sunday night.

expert_rss.title: Indian startup head Kunal Shah appointed as new WhatsApp boss
expert_rss.summary:
Meta has tapped Indian fintech founder Kunal Shah as the new head of WhatsApp, as the US tech giant seeks ways to monetise the messaging app’s massive user base.
The announcement, made Monday night, was accompanied by news that Meta would also lead a $900 million funding round in Shah’s consumer finance firm CRED.
